name: google-tag-manager-pp-mcp
description: Mirror any GTM container into a local database, then audit, diff, and query it from the terminal — everything the GTM console can't do, read-only and safe against production.

gtm_access_token.title: GTM_ACCESS_TOKEN
gtm_access_token.description: Google OAuth access token (tagmanager.readonly scope). From gcloud auth print-access-token or a service-account token.
